creator: zaphod@berentweb.com
text:
1. Some Firefox icons for add-ons don't use the correct icons, but
fall-back to an "icon set" instead. The icon set is (from L->R)
download-history-bookmarks-NewTab-NewWindow-reload-rss. If one tries to
customize a toolbar (right click->customize) the opened menu shows this
same "toolbar set" for many of the toolbar items that should in fact be
shown as single icon. The same error existed in Firefox-8.

2. Upgrading a Firefox version re-sets any installed xpi-addon from ports,
while the other addons installed directly from Firefox are not lost. I
always have to go back and re-install the xpis from the ports to get them
back in Firefox. The same xpis are not lost by Seamonkey after a version
upgrade.

Fix: 

NA
How-To-Repeat: Install an xpi then install Firefox.
